rule_text: For ADMEASUREMENT contracts, where there is a discrepancy between the UNIT PRICE and the TOTAL PRICE (obtained by multiplying unit price × quantity), the UNIT PRICE shall PREVAIL and the total price shall be CORRECTED — UNLESS the Authority determines there is an OBVIOUS MISPLACEMENT of the DECIMAL POINT in the unit price, in which case the TOTAL PRICE as quoted shall GOVERN.
verification_method: PASS if the BoQ-correction rules explicitly state unit-price-prevails (with decimal-misplacement override). FAIL on inconsistent or absent correction rules.

rule_text: Where there is a discrepancy between WORDS and FIGURES in a quoted price, the AMOUNT IN WORDS shall PREVAIL — UNLESS the amount in words is itself related to an arithmetic error, in which case the AMOUNT IN FIGURES shall PREVAIL (subject to unit-price/total-correction rules).
verification_method: PASS if ITB explicitly states words-prevail-over-figures with arithmetic-error carve-out. FAIL otherwise.

rule_text: Bidders SHALL be REQUESTED to ACCEPT the correction of arithmetical errors. FAILURE to ACCEPT the correction per ITB 36.1 SHALL RESULT in REJECTION of the Bid AND FORFEITURE of EMD.
verification_method: PASS if rejection-on-non-acceptance is explicit in ITB. FAIL if non-acceptance has no consequence.

rule_text: PRIOR to expiration of the Bid Validity Period AND upon EXPIRY of the STANDSTILL PERIOD specified in BDS ITB 44.1 (or any extension thereof) — OR upon SATISFACTORILY ADDRESSING a complaint filed within the Standstill Period — the Authority SHALL TRANSMIT the LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE (LoA) to the successful Bidder specifying the Contract Price.
verification_method: PASS if LoA workflow respects standstill expiry/complaint resolution. FAIL on premature LoA issuance during standstill.

rule_text: At the time of LoA issuance, the Authority SHALL PUBLISH a CONTRACT AWARD NOTICE containing AT MINIMUM: (a) name and address of the Authority; (b) name and reference number of the contract and selection method used; (c) NAMES of ALL Bidders that submitted Bids and their as-read and as-evaluated Bid prices; (d) names of all Bidders whose bids were rejected (non-responsive / unqualified / unevaluated) with reasons; (e) name of the successful Bidder, final total contract price, contract duration and summary of scope.
verification_method: PASS if award notice published on portal containing all 5 mandatory fields. FAIL on partial publication.

rule_text: The AUTHORITY SHALL USE the AP State e-Procurement system at https://www.apeprocurement.gov.in to MANAGE this Bidding process — including (i) Technical Proposal in required formats AND (ii) Financial Proposal (Priced Bid uploaded through the web-portal ONLY).
verification_method: PASS if ITB BDS explicitly names apeprocurement.gov.in. FAIL on alternate / unauthorised portal.

rule_text: Maximum number of MEMBERS in a JOINT VENTURE for this contract SHALL be ALLOWED 2 (TWO).
verification_method: PASS if BDS caps JV size at 2. FAIL if 3+ permitted without justification.

rule_text: In ADDITION to the original of the Bid, the NUMBER OF COPIES required is ONE.
verification_method: PASS if BDS specifies 1 copy. FAIL if not specified.

rule_text: Bid submission SHALL be done MANDATORILY via the web portal at https://www.apeprocurement.gov.in. The bidder SHALL REGISTER on the e-procurement marketplace before submission. Bids shall be submitted in TWO STAGES: Stage I (Eligibility + Technical Bid); Stage II (Financial Bid).
verification_method: PASS if NIT/BDS lists apeprocurement.gov.in as sole submission portal AND mandates 2-stage online submission. FAIL on offline-only submission or alternate portal.

rule_text: Bid submission deadline for this RFB (Vizag UGSS Pkg-2 Balance Works): DATE 18-04-2026, TIME 4:00 PM at the Authority's address per ITB 7.1.
verification_method: PASS if NIT date/time matches BDS. FAIL on mismatch.
